_comment: Fixture for replay-determinism-anchor RED tests. Provides a stable MC input spec and two cycle_ids whose seeds are pre-computed via derive_cycle_mc_seed (SHA-256 into 2^64 space). No mc_prob or cvar_5pct literals are stored here — tests assert equality across two independent replays, never against a producer-computed value (PA-18).

mc_inputs.description: Minimal but non-degenerate MC input. Alternating returns give the kNN selector enough variation to pick a non-empty neighbor pool across different spy_today_return values.

expected_column_set._comment: Exact column list for cvar_diagnostics table as defined in the 021_cvar_diagnostics plan. Tests assert PRAGMA table_info returns exactly these names. Update this list if a future migration adds a column — that is the intent of the column-add reminder test.
